method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm after regenerating figures with embedded TrueType fonts, adding earlier capability-preservation caveats, tightening the theory framing, and fixing the scout artifact wording. Verified pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the changed abstract/intro/theory/misalignment pages plus the full-paper contact sheet. Citations and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
